name: coODGetSize
title: coODGetSize
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
dword coODGetSize( dword index, dword subIndex, dword errCode[] );
The function returns the size of an object in the local object dictionary in bytes.
index Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
subIndex Sub index of the object, value range 0..255
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Size of the object in bytes
Example dword errCode[1];dword size;size = coODGetSize( 0x1000, 0x0, errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "Object size: %d byte", size);}
